original_subject: fix(dori): add md5 check for unchanged files in update_workspace command
curated_subject: fix(commands): skip unchanged files in update_workspace via md5 check
diff:
diff --git a/dori/commands.py b/dori/commands.py
index c9af0ce..76a459d 100644
--- a/dori/commands.py
+++ b/dori/commands.py
@@ -632,6 +632,12 @@ def update_workspace(
             )
             continue
 
+        source_md5 = _compute_md5(src)
+        if current_md5 == source_md5:
+            console.print(f"[green]Unchanged[/green] {relative}")
+            manifest[relative] = current_md5
+            continue
+
         shutil.copy2(src, dest)
         manifest[relative] = _compute_md5(dest)
         console.print(f"[green]Updated[/green] {relative}")
recent_subjects: test(tests): Update test_init_presets.py to report unchanged managed files.
fix(boilerplate): add commit message retry options and collapse alternative subjects in subject line
test(tests): add tests for importing modules without script dir shadowing and loading ddgs without script dir shadowing
fix(boilerplate): fix import issues in ddgs and ollama modules
fix(dori): edit last message on ctrl+r instead of retrying
